---
title: "Academic Activity Dashboard"
author: "Brad Cannell"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons: []
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

data_dir <- "../data"

col_types_publications <- cols(
  id = col_character(),
  publication_type = col_character(),
  title = col_character(),
  authors = col_character(),
  journal_or_venue = col_character(),
  year = col_double(),
  month = col_double(),
  day = col_double(),
  DOI = col_character(),
  PMID = col_character(),
  url = col_character(),
  author_position = col_character(),
  mentee_author = col_logical(),
  multi_institution = col_logical(),
  status = col_character(),
  notes = col_character()
)

publications <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "publications.csv"), col_types = col_types_publications)
grants <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "grants.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
effort_by_year <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "effort_by_year.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
presentations <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "presentations.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
teaching <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "teaching.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
service <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "service.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
service_log <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "service_log.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
mentoring <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "mentoring.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
awards <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "awards.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
reviewer_relationships <- read_csv(file.path(data_dir, "reviewer_relationships.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

grants <- grants %>% mutate(start_year = as.integer(substr(start_date, 1, 4)))

money <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "", paste0("$", formatC(x, format = "d", big.mark = ",")))
}

blank_na <- function(x) tidyr::replace_na(x, "")
```

# Overview

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Publications"
#| icon: journal-text
#| color: primary
nrow(publications)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Funded Grants"
#| icon: cash-coin
#| color: success
sum(grants$status == "funded")
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Funding"
#| icon: piggy-bank
#| color: success
money(sum(grants$total_cost[grants$status %in% c("funded", "completed")], na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Presentations"
#| icon: mic
#| color: info
nrow(presentations)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Active Mentees"
#| icon: people
#| color: info
sum(is.na(mentoring$end_year))
```

## Row {height="40%"}

### Column {width="60%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Publications by Year"
publications %>%
  count(year) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2c3e50") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Publications") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

### Column {width="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Publications by Type"
publications %>%
  count(publication_type) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(publication_type, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2c3e50") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

## Row {height="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Grant Funding by Start Year"
grants %>%
  filter(!is.na(start_year)) %>%
  group_by(start_year) %>%
  summarise(total_cost = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = start_year, y = total_cost)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#18795a") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_dollar(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Total award amount") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

# Funding

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Funded (active)"
#| icon: check-circle
#| color: success
sum(grants$status == "funded")
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Completed"
#| icon: archive
#| color: secondary
sum(grants$status == "completed")
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "PI / Site PI Grants"
#| icon: award
#| color: primary
sum(grants$role %in% c("PI", "Site PI"))
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "All Grants"
grants %>%
  arrange(desc(start_date)) %>%
  transmute(
    Title = title,
    Role = role,
    Sponsor = funder_abbreviation,
    `Award #` = blank_na(award_number),
    Status = status,
    `Total Cost` = money(total_cost),
    Start = start_date,
    End = end_date,
    `Effort %` = ifelse(is.na(effort_percent), "", as.character(effort_percent))
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

# Publications

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "All Publications"
publications %>%
  arrange(desc(year), desc(month)) %>%
  transmute(
    Year = year,
    Title = title,
    Journal = journal_or_venue,
    Type = publication_type,
    Position = author_position,
    Status = status
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

# Teaching & Mentoring

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Ongoing Courses"
#| icon: mortarboard
#| color: primary
sum(is.na(teaching$end_year))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Active Mentees"
#| icon: people-fill
#| color: info
sum(is.na(mentoring$end_year))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Active Service Roles"
#| icon: briefcase
#| color: secondary
sum(is.na(service$end_year))
```

## Row

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Ongoing Teaching"
teaching %>%
  filter(is.na(end_year)) %>%
  transmute(Institution = institution, Course = paste(course_code, course_title, sep = " — "), `Since` = start_year, Role = role) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Active Mentoring"
mentoring %>%
  filter(is.na(end_year)) %>%
  transmute(Mentee = mentee_name, Role = role, Context = degree_or_context, Since = start_year) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

### Column {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Active Service"
service %>%
  filter(is.na(end_year)) %>%
  transmute(Organization = organization, Role = role, Category = category, Since = start_year) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Ongoing Reviewer Relationships"
reviewer_relationships %>%
  filter(status == "ongoing") %>%
  transmute(Journal = journal_or_venue, Type = relationship_type) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```
